allow: PowerShell($body = @{ name = "Test User"; email = "test@example.com"; subject = "Portfolio form test"; message = "Hi Zain, this is a test message from your new contact form backend. If you received this email, the backend works!" } | ConvertTo-Json; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/contact" -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })
PowerShell(try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 5 | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Output "SERVER DOWN: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Page loads: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Start-Process "http://localhost:5000/")

PowerShell($page = try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/" -TimeoutSec 5; "Page: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Page ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; $api = $body = @{ name = "Zain Test"; email = "test@example.com"; subject = "Same-origin test"; message = "Testing after the CORS fix." } | ConvertTo-Json; $apiRes = try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/contact" -Method Post -Body $api -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 30 | ConvertTo-Json } catch { "API ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Output $page; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output $apiRes)

PowerShell($git = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; & $git add -A; & $git -c user.email="zainn8847@gmail.com" -c user.name="ZainNawaz732" commit -m "Fix CORS blocking same-origin requests; serve frontend from Node server"; & $git push origin main)
